action: Claire descend lentement du véhicule, son mouvement fluide témoignant de son désir de se connecter avec les villageois. Elle avance doucement vers le centre du cercle formé par les villageois, ses pas mesurés montrant à la fois respect et volonté de s'intégrer à la communauté.

attitude.attitude_protagoniste: Claire aborde la scène avec une attitude ouverte et enthousiaste, son sourire rayonnant témoignant de sa joie d'être accueillie si chaleureusement.

attitude.interaction_continue: Les villageois continuent d'interagir avec Claire de manière amicale, certains lui tendent la main pour la saluer, tandis qu'un villageois, avec un geste solennel mais joyeux, place un collier autour de son cou, marquant ainsi son accueil officiel dans la communauté.

prompt_video: In a picturesque African village with terracotta houses and a bustling market, the scene unfolds in the mid-morning with soft, golden light illuminating the surroundings. Claire, dressed in a light linen dress of sand color and comfortable sandals, disembarks from a local vehicle. She is greeted warmly by smiling villagers who form a small circle around her. Claire stands near the open door of the vehicle, one foot still on the step, expressing genuine joy with a broad smile as she raises her hand slightly in greeting. The villagers respond with friendly gestures, some waving, others nodding gently. As the scene progresses, Claire moves to the center of the circle, feeling honored and touched, her expression showing gratitude. A villager delicately places a traditional necklace around her neck, and Claire inclines her head slightly to facilitate the gesture, thanking them with a radiant smile. The wide shot captures the setting, emphasizing Claire's involvement in the community project. The slow lateral tracking movement of the camera follows Claire as she interacts with the villagers, symbolizing her active participation and continuity in the community. Filmed at eye level, the shot fosters identification and equality with Claire as she engages with the villagers.
prompt_video_fr: Dans un village africain pittoresque éclairé par une douce lumière dorée, Claire arrive dans un véhicule local et est accueillie chaleureusement par des villageois souriants. Elle exprime une joie sincère en saluant les villageois, qui forment un cercle amical autour d'elle. Un villageois lui offre un collier traditionnel en signe de bienvenue, renforçant son sentiment d'honneur et de gratitude.

prompt_video: Scene 2 is set in a rural village in West Africa, near a small school under construction, during a soft golden morning. Claire, dressed in a white t-shirt, beige cargo pants, and sturdy hiking shoes, actively participates in transporting bricks with the villagers. She stands near a pile of bricks at the entrance of the construction site, sharing smiles and laughter with the locals as they work together. The scene captures a close-up shot of Claire, highlighting her joyful expression and interaction with the community. The camera remains fixed, set at eye level to create an intimate connection, while the warm, medium-saturated lighting enhances the serene atmosphere. As the scene progresses, Claire moves towards the center of the site, handing a brick to a village man, their shared glance and smiles reflecting complicity and satisfaction. The villagers' coordinated and fluid movements, along with Claire's active engagement, convey a sense of community spirit and shared joy in their collective effort.
prompt_video_fr: Claire participe à la construction d'une école dans un village rural en Afrique de l'Ouest. Elle partage des moments de joie et de complicité avec les habitants en transportant des briques. La scène, capturée en plan rapproché poitrine, met en avant l'engagement et la satisfaction de Claire dans un cadre serein et chaleureux.

prompt_video: Scene 3 is set at the edge of an African lake, surrounded by lush vegetation. It is late afternoon with the golden light of sunset casting a warm glow. Claire, a woman around 40 years old, is seated alone on a smooth stone, slightly turned towards the water. She is wearing a light earth-colored cotton dress suitable for the warm climate, along with comfortable sandals. Her demeanor is calm and serene, with her hands resting relaxed on her knees. As she observes the reflections of the sun on the peaceful lake, she maintains a straight yet relaxed posture, her expression soft with a subtle curve of contentment on her lips. The camera captures this moment in a medium shot, emphasizing both Claire and the vast African savannah, with a slow forward tracking movement to draw the viewer into the intimacy of the scene. The angle is at eye level, creating a direct connection with Claire's sense of alignment and peace with her surroundings. The scene ends with Claire slightly tilting her head, deeply absorbed by the landscape's beauty, breathing deeply, her eyes half-closed, conveying a sense of alignment and peace. The dominant color palette features warm browns and golden accents, with a warm light and medium saturation.

La caméra, en plan moyen, capture cette scène sereine dans une lumière dorée, soulignant l'harmonie de Claire avec le paysage.

prompt_video: The scene is set on top of a hill overlooking the vast African savannah during twilight, bathed in the golden light of the setting sun. Claire, a woman in her forties, stands alone, wearing a beige linen dress, a light straw hat, and comfortable sandals. She is slightly turned to her right, offering an unobstructed view of the breathtaking landscape below. Her expression is one of wonder and tranquility, with her arms relaxed at her sides. As the scene progresses, Claire leans slightly forward, her eyes fixed on the horizon where the sun begins to set, embodying a deep sense of inner peace and alignment. She gently places a hand over her heart, expressing gratitude and connection to the moment. The camera uses a slow panoramic movement to gradually reveal the expansive context, emphasizing Claire's immersion and engagement with her surroundings. The lighting is warm, with a dominant palette of #D8A65A and accents of #6E4B3A, creating a serene ambiance. The scene is captured in a medium shot from eye level, fostering an empathetic connection with Claire as she remains anchored in the present, fully aware of the beauty of the natural world embracing her.
prompt_video_fr: La scène se déroule au sommet d'une colline surplombant la vaste savane africaine au crépuscule, baignée par la lumière dorée du coucher de soleil. Claire, seule, ressent un profond sentiment de paix intérieure et d'alignement en admirant le paysage. Elle exprime sa gratitude en posant une main sur son cœur, tandis que la caméra effectue un panoramique lent pour révéler le contexte environnant.
